title: First title in 40 years? Inside the Mets' winter makeover -- and what's next

content: The Lions are trading running back David Montgomery to the Texans for offensive lineman Juice Scruggs and two draft picks, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: Sources: Chiefs to cut Taylor, save $20M on cap
content: The Chiefs have informed offensive tackle Jawaan Taylor that he will be released before the start of the league year, barring a trade, sources told ESPN.

content: Jurors sent out a pair of notes on their second day of deliberations to say they were hopelessly deadlocked.

content: UConn heads into the postseason undefeated and still the unanimous No. 1 choice in The Associated Press women's basketball Top 25.

title: Athletes facing travel issues amid Middle East war
content: Tennis star Daniil Medvedev indicated he's among a small number of athletes trying to leave Dubai as the war in the Middle East has caused a widespread travel shutdown.

title: Colorado QB Ponder dies in single-car crash at 23
content: Colorado quarterback Dominiq Ponder died early Sunday morning in a single-car crash, according to police. He was 23.

title: Plum: WNBA's CBA offer is 'win,' but talks go on
content: Kelsey Plum said the CBA offer from the league to the WNBPA is a "significant win," but negotiations should continue and "a strike would be the worst thing for both sides."

content: Chad Baker-Mazara is no longer a member of the men's basketball program, USC announced, a day after he left the Trojans' loss to Nebraska.

content: With one week until NFL free agency, let's put defensive players into six tiers based on their potential offseason contracts.

content: Entering January, the Cavaliers were stuck in a play-in spot. They've since racked up the best record in the NBA and added an 11-time All-Star.

content: Iran are scheduled to play at the 2026 World Cup in just over 100 days' time. Here's what we know -- and what we don't -- about whether they will still take part.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Will Kane, Vinícius extend their contracts?
content: Bayern Munich want striker Harry Kane to sign a new contract, and Real Madrid want the same for Vinícius Júnior. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Trump says Op Epic Fury was US' 'last best chance' to eliminate 'intolerable' threats
content: President Trump stated that operations against Iran are expected to last four to five weeks, with the US prepared to extend the campaign if necessary. The stated objectives include destroying Iran's missile and naval capabilities, preventing nuclear weapon acquisition, and halting support for terrorist groups, framing the action as a response to decades of attacks.

title: How 15 balls reignited India's T20 World Cup campaign before Sanju's 97
content: While Sanju's 97 in Kolkata will be remembered, his short-lived but significant innings against Zimbabwe three days prior had brought momentum to India's T20 World Cup campaign.

title: How much do China, India, Japan depend on Middle Eastern crude, gas?
content: How much are China, Japan, India, and South Korea exposed to Middle East oil supply disruption risks? Where do their strategic oil reserves stand? Let’s take a look:

title: After signing Pentagon deal, Sam Altman to Silicon Valley: You have double standards
content: OpenAI has secured a contract with the Department of War for classified network deployment, following earlier discussions about non-classified work. CEO Sam Altman emphasized the need for AI companies to support the US government's mission, pushing back against perceived hypocrisy in the tech industry's stance on geopolitical competition with China.

title: Will petrol, diesel rates be hiked in India as crude nears $80 mark on Middle East tensions?
content: Pump prices for petrol and diesel have remained unchanged since April 2022. Domestic fuel prices have stayed steady even when global fuel rates climbed due to higher crude costs.

title: Apple iPhone 17e with A19 chip launched in India for Rs 64,999: All you need to know
content: Apple unveils the iPhone 17e, its most affordable model, starting at Rs 64,900 in India. This budget-friendly device boasts MagSafe wireless charging, the powerful A19 chip, and double the base storage.  With a refined design and enhanced camera capabilities, it offers significant upgrades for consumers seeking value.

title: Beginner's Guide: How Oct 7 changed the Middle East
content: Hamas’s October 7 attack triggered a regional unravelling that had been decades in the making. This piece traces how Iran built the Axis of Resistance after the 1979 Revolution through Hezbollah, Hamas, the Houthis and allied militias, and how Israel, backed by a far more permissive Trump White House, systematically targeted that network. From Soleimani’s killing to covert strikes deep inside hostile territory, the balance of deterrence has shifted. The Axis stands weakened, its leadership disrupted, its aura punctured. Yet the forces that created it remain. The Middle East rarely offers clean endings. The war has changed the region, not concluded it.

title: CEO of multi-billion software company Workday says AI Agents are not replacing us
content: Workday CEO Aneel Bhusri reassured investors that AI won't replace essential HR software, despite a recent stock dip following a revenue forecast.  The company, which announced 2% workforce cuts, is developing AI agents to enhance, not replace, its enterprise systems, aiming for a consumption-based model.

title: Oil supply in trouble? Centre holds key meet as Iran attacks Saudi Arabia, Qatar
content: India is closely monitoring its crude oil and fuel supply amid escalating Middle East tensions. The government assures domestic availability and affordability of petroleum products. Disruptions in Qatar's LNG production and Saudi Arabia's oil refinery have already impacted global markets, with European gas prices surging.

title: Stuck in Dubai, PV Sindhu pulls out of All England amid rising tensions
content: PV Sindhu has withdrawn from the All England Championships due to travel disruptions in Dubai, but will compete in the Swiss Open next week. The rest of the Indian contingent is in Birmingham, aiming to break a 25-year jinx at the prestigious event. Several Indian players face tough opening rounds against top international opponents.

title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan: I was shocked to find China's Huawei has hired engineers who can...
content: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan expressed shock at Huawei's 100+ CPU architects, developing alternatives to advanced chip tools and lithography. He warned China is rapidly closing the semiconductor gap through engineering and infrastructure optimization, even excelling in open-source AI. Tan urged the US against complacency, stating China could soon lead.

title: Happy Choti Holi 2026: 51 best Holi wishes, messages, quotes and images to share
content: As winter fades, the air fills with festive scents, signaling the arrival of Holi. Tonight, Holika Dahan offers a chance to gather around bonfires, enjoy sweets, and symbolically burn away negativity before tomorrow's vibrant celebrations. The article provides message ideas for family, friends, and colleagues to navigate the festival's digital and real-world interactions.

title: S-400, Akash, Sukhoi: India showcases aerial defence at Vayu Shakti amid China-Pak threat
content: The Indian Air Force demonstrated its growing military strength at Vayu Shakti-2026. The exercise highlighted advanced air defence systems like the S-400 and indigenous Akash missiles. Various fighter jets, helicopters, and transport aircraft showcased coordinated combat operations. This event signals India's enhanced preparedness and deterrence capabilities.

title: 'She has down drome': Brittany Mahomes faces brutal fan reactions following NFL WAGs lineup video
content: Brittany Mahomes drew intense online reactions after appearing in the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit NFL WAGs promo video. While some fans praised her introduction and confidence, many mocked her inclusion and appearance, sparking a heated social media debate. The mixed response highlights the scrutiny NFL partners face and how public visibility often invites both admiration and harsh criticism.

title: Wild's offer for Vincent Trocheck pressures Rangers before trade deadline
content: According to the Minnesota Wild, a standing trade deal is on Vincent Trocheck, which is putting pressure on the New York Rangers before the conclusion of the NHL trade deadline. As there are playoff implications and salary cap implications in play, both teams have some decisions to make that could define their future perspectives of the playoffs, as well as how they would build around their rosters in the long term.

title: NFL Trade News: Jets eye Broncos' $12M QB after Fields plan fails
content: The New York Jets are exploring veteran options for their quarterback position. They might sign two veteran players to support their primary signal caller Justin Fields. General Manager Darren Mougey is reportedly a fan of Denver Broncos quarterback Jarrett Stidham. The team is evaluating all possible scenarios for the 2026 season. Stidham is under contract with Denver but could be a trade option as he is on his final year.

title: Apple iPhone 17e launched with MagSafe, A19 chip, double storage: How much it costs in India
content: Apple has launched the iPhone 17e in India at Rs 64,900, bringing MagSafe wireless charging, the A19 chip, and double the base storage to its most affordable iPhone 17 series model. The phone features a 48MP Fusion camera with 2x telephoto, Ceramic Shield 2 display protection, and the faster C1X modem. Pre-orders begin March 4, with availability from March 11.

title: 'Trying to keep my family safe': England star cricketer's desperate plea from war-hit Dubai
content: Wicket-keeper Jonny Bairstow is stranded in Dubai with his family due to halted commercial flights amid rising Middle East tensions. He expressed distress over ensuring their safety and seeking a route home, while cricket schedules have also been disrupted. The UK government advises British nationals in the UAE to shelter in place.

title: 'I felt helpless': Rohit Sharma's honest admission on India vs Pakistan thriller
content: Rohit Sharma cherishes the 2007 T20 World Cup final against Pakistan as his most memorable encounter. He also highlighted the thrilling 2022 MCG clash, where Virat Kohli's extraordinary innings secured a dramatic win from a dire situation. Sharma emphasized that nerves remained a constant throughout his career, fueling his desire to perform.

title: Philadelphia 76ers vs Boston Celtics injury report: head-to-head records and team stats
content: The Philadelphia 76ers face the Boston Celtics at TD Garden on March 1, 2026, in a crucial Atlantic Division matchup. Both teams are significantly impacted by injuries, with Joel Embiid out for Philadelphia and Jayson Tatum still sidelined for Boston. This short-handed contest will heavily feature Tyrese Maxey for the 76ers and Jaylen Brown for the Celtics.

title: NHL Trade Rumors: $25 million price tag fuels speculation of Leafs-Oilers blockbuster
content: The Toronto Maple Leafs are weighing serious trade interest in winger Bobby McMann as their season slips. With Edmonton leading the chase and contract talks stalled over a reported $5 million AAV ask, Toronto is carefully evaluating offers ahead of the March 6 deadline. Management is not acting out of panic but seeking meaningful return, while multiple teams monitor McMann’s availability.

title: George Kittle’s wife Claire stuns in 49ers-red bikini after SI spotlight
content: Claire Kittle has captured offseason attention with a striking red bikini post following her Sports Illustrated Swimsuit shoot, while George Kittle faces rehab after a torn Achilles. Despite retirement speculation as he nears 33, the 49ers tight end remains determined to return, declaring his love for football and joking that his wife will decide when he is done. Together, the Kittles balance recovery, resilience, and rising visibility.

title: 'Not about democracy building': US sets clear mission goals for Iran op
content: US defense secretary Pete Hegseth stated that military operations against Iran are not a nation-building effort like the Iraq War, emphasizing a focus on destroying Iran's missile threat and nuclear advancement.  More US casualties are anticipated as the campaign is described as a "clear, devastating, decisive mission" not aimed at regime change, though the regime has indeed changed.

title: Lunar Eclipse 2026: When and where to watch; city-wise timings in India
content: Skywatchers in India are eagerly anticipating a rare lunar eclipse on March 3, 2026, a 'Blood Moon' event visible across the nation after moonrise. This celestial spectacle, occurring in Leo, promises a unique visual experience and may bring personal transformations. Unlike solar eclipses, this lunar event requires no special eye protection.

title: Suryakumar Yadav takes off cap, bows to Sanju Samson - WATCH
content: Sanju Samson's unbeaten 97 guided India to a five-wicket victory over West Indies, securing a T20 World Cup semifinal spot. Captain Suryakumar Yadav's heartfelt bow to Samson after the win symbolized immense respect and acknowledged the batter's crucial match-winning performance under pressure.

title: 'Got Khamenei before he got me,' says Trump; how real is threat of Iran strike on US prez?
content: Following the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, US President Donald Trump claimed Iran plotted his assassination. Security experts believe Iran lacks the capability for a direct military strike on a US President.  Asymmetric threats like drone or cyber attacks are considered more plausible.  The US maintains robust protection for its leader.

title: Dhanush's 'Kara' locks April release; actor announces officially with an intriguing poster
content: Dhanush's highly anticipated film 'Kara' is set for a worldwide theatrical release on April 30, exciting fans with a striking new poster. Directed by Vignesh Raja, the movie features Dhanush as a cotton farmer entangled in a revenge-driven, suspenseful thriller with a strong ensemble cast. This release marks a significant point in Dhanush's upcoming projects.

title: What is the Employees' Provident Fund interest rate for FY 2025-26? Here’s what EPFO has decided
content: The rate will be formally notified by the Government of India, after which the Employees' Provident Fund Organisation will credit the interest to subscribers’ accounts.

title: US-Israel-Iran war: What’s the impact on India? Explained in 5 points
content: Ongoing US-Israel conflict with Iran is impacting India's economy, particularly through rising crude oil prices and potential trade disruptions. Policymakers are monitoring the situation, with immediate effects seen in energy costs and stock market declines. Broader consequences include inflation, current account deficit widening, and supply chain interruptions.

title: Govt unveils new EV drive tech in India: Could cut imports and costs
content: India has launched a new 30 kW Wide Band Gap (WBG)-based Integrated Drive System (IDS) for electric vehicles, developed by C-DAC in partnership with IIT Madras and Lucas TVS. This indigenous system aims to boost domestic manufacturing of key EV components, reduce import reliance, and lower costs.

title: US-Iran war: Kuwait 'mistakenly' shoots down 3 American F-15s in friendly fire incident
content: Three US F-15E fighter jets crashed in Kuwait early Monday due to a friendly fire incident, according to US central command. All six crew members ejected safely and are in stable condition. The incident occurred amidst escalating regional tensions and Iranian retaliatory strikes, with Kuwait also intercepting hostile drones. The cause is under investigation.

title: ‘We’re safe’: Sreeja Konidela reassures her safety from Dubai amid tensions
content: Chiranjeevi's daughter Sreeja Konidela reassured fans from Dubai that she and her children are safe and well-protected amidst reports of unrest. She expressed gratitude for the concern and shared a picture of the Dubai skyline, affirming her choice to live there. Her message brought relief to those worried about her well-being.

title: PCB to fine Pakistan players PKR 50 lakhs each after T20 World Cup exit
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has decided to take the most bizarre of actions after the Pakistan team's average performance in the ongoing T20 World Cup.

title: US-Israel strikes in Iran: Indian national killed in attack on oil tanker off Oman coast
content: An Indian national has died after an oil tanker, the MKD VYOM, was attacked by an unmanned boat off the coast of Oman. The strike caused a fire and explosion in the vessel's engine room. This incident occurs amid heightened tensions and ongoing retaliation campaigns in the Gulf region.

title: Chandra Grahan 2026: Do's and don'ts for pregnant women during Lunar Eclipse
content: A rare lunar eclipse on March 3, 2026, coincides with Holi, a major Hindu festival. While modern science finds no harm, traditional beliefs advise pregnant women to take precautions.  Staying indoors, avoiding food and drink, and engaging in spiritual practices like chanting mantras are recommended for protection during this celestial event.

title: Holika Dahan 2026 date: Shubh muhurat, bhadra time, puja rituals and significance
content: Holika Dahan, also known as Choti Holi, marks the triumph of good over evil. Celebrated on March 2, 2026, it commemorates Lord Vishnu saving Prahalad from Hiranyakashipu. The bonfire symbolizes burning negativity like ego and anger. Devotees also worship Kshetrapal for protection, often with homemade sweets and mustard oil lamps.

content: The first post-dissolution meeting saw approvals for a land deal priced at earlier auction rates, ₹500-crore allocations to two new corporations, and several pending city projects

content: The environmental compensation will be fixed based on the ‘polluter pays principle’. The PCB has to work out the amount based on the waste generated by the violators

title: 116 Flights Cancelled At Mumbai Airport Amid Gulf Airspace Closure
content: The ongoing military escalation in the Middle East, involving the United States, Israel and Iran, has triggered severe disruptions to global aviation, leaving hundreds of flights cancelled and passengers stranded.

content: Lebanon's government has decided on an "immediate ban" of Iran-backed Hezbollah's military and security activity, Prime Minister Nawaf Salam said Monday, in an unprecedented move as Israel retaliated to rocket fire.

content: For military aircraft flying in contested airspace monitored by air defence systems operating in their highest alert level, the risk of a blue-on-blue or friendly fire incident rises exponentially.

content: The ripple effects of the US-Israel air strikes on Iran are being felt far beyond the conflict zone - all the way to India's basmati heartland. Haryana's rice mills are slowing down, exporters are under pressure, and nearly 1.5 lakh metric tonnes of

title: Gas Leak At Chemical Unit In Maharashtra's Palghar, Over 2,600 Evacuated
content: A massive leak of hazardous oleum gas at a chemical unit in Maharashtra's Palghar district on Monday led to the evacuation of over 2,600 people, including 1,600 school students, while three persons complained of minor eye irritation, officials said.

title: On Camera, Israel Neutralises Iranian Soldiers Activating Air Defence System
content: A video released by Israel's military of the rapidly escalating confrontation between Israel and Iran shows what Israeli officials say was a strike on Iranian soldiers attempting to activate an air defence system.

title: Khamenei's Wife, Injured In US-Israel Strikes, Has Died: Iranian Media
content: Mansoureh Khojasteh Bagherzadeh - the wife of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's supreme leader who was killed on Saturday - has died after succumbing to wounds sustained during the US-Israeli attack, Iranian media reported. She was 79.

title: India-Canada Ties Gained New Energy: PM Modi After Meeting Canadian Counterpart
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Monday said that the friendship between India and Canada has gained new energy, mutual trust and positivity since his first meeting with Canadian counterpart Mark Carney, last year.

title: All About US F-15 Fighter Jets, Downed Accidentally By Kuwaiti Forces
content: The F-15E is a twin-engine multirole all-weather fighter jet that was designed to meet the US demand for a pure air superiority fighter.

title: Srinagar's City Centre Shut, Crowd Protesting Khamenei Death Clash With Cops
content: Intense clashes erupted in Srinagar after police stopped a crowd protesting the killing of Iranian Supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, from marching towards city centre Lal Chowk.

content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Monday spoke to the King of Bahrain, Hamad Bin Isa Al Khalifa, and the Crown Prince and Prime Minister of Saudi Arabia, Mohammed Bin Salman.

content: Iran's president appointed on Monday Revolutionary Guards general Majid Ebnelreza as acting defence minister after his predecessor was killed in Israeli-US strikes.

content: Nearly six years after the alleged custodial torture and deaths of a father and son in Tamil Nadu's Thoothukudi district triggered nationwide outrage, a court in Madurai is set to deliver its verdict on March 23 in the sensational Sathankulam case.

content: With the additional funding, the 26 merged divisions will receive a total of ₹70 lakh each, while the 50 established wards will receive ₹65 lakh for the financial year

title: Dharmendra Pradhan pitches for international collaborations in education

title: A.P. sets up control room to help Telugu people stranded in the Gulf

title: Karnataka expatriates safe but anxious as tensions escalate in West Asia

title: GCDA to scale up stadium sewage treatment plant to full capacity of 750 KLD

title: Live NHL trade tracker for 2025-26: All the deals made before March 6 deadline
content: the trade deadline for the 2025-26 NHL season is March 7 . the deals continue to roll in as contenders look to bolster their rosters . you'll find information on every trade made since the start of the regular season .

title: Our NFL offseason trade grades: Who won the David Montgomery deal?
content: the Lions traded David Montgomery to the Texans for guard Juice Scruggs and two draft picks . the move was the first big move of the offseason, with a move from the texans and texas last week . ESPN analytics writer seth Walder is grading the biggest signings and trades of the season .

title: Who will win all 31 men's Champ Week tournaments, and why
content: all 31 division I men's college basketball conferences will go through the process of crowning tournament champions . five conferences -- the Ivy League, Atlantic 10, SEC, American and Big Ten -- will crown their winners just before the selection committee announces the 68-team field for March Madness .

title: 🏈 Too early? College football coaches on hot seat
content: college football's coaching carousel moves fast and furiously, claiming coaches from the expected (Oklahoma State's Mike Gundy, Florida's Billy Napier) to the downright shocking (Michigan's Sherrone Moore). the SEC and Big Ten had a combined nine coaching changes, including at four programs -- Michigan, LSU, Auburn and Florida .

title: The four NHL teams that need a blockbuster trade before Friday's deadline
content: a handful of front offices might look at their current position in the standings, and decide it's time rebuild . Connor McDavid gave the franchise two more seasons past this one to figure it out by signing one of the most team-friendly deals in recent professional sports history .
